Cardiovascular diseases.notes: Includes heart diseases, vascular diseases, blood pressure disorders

Kidney diseases.notes: C12.777 = kidney diseases under urologic; C13.351.968 = kidney diseases under female urogenital. Also match descriptors with 'renal' or 'kidney' in preferred name.

Cancer.notes: All neoplasms. The semantic type 'neop' (Neoplastic Process) is a strong standalone signal.

Neurological diseases.notes: Includes neurodegenerative, cerebrovascular, vestibular. Exclude C10.228.140.490 (headache as standalone).

Eye diseases.notes: Includes SANS (spaceflight-associated neuro-ocular syndrome), retinal, corneal, glaucoma.

Rare inherited disorders.mesh_name: Congenital, Hereditary, and Neonatal Diseases and Abnormalities
Rare inherited disorders.notes: C16 covers genetic/congenital. Also match descriptors whose preferred name contains 'hereditary', 'congenital', 'genetic disorder', 'inborn error'.

Women's health.mesh_name: Female Urogenital Diseases and Pregnancy Complications
Women's health.notes: C13 covers female reproductive, pregnancy, gynecological. Exclude kidney sub-branch (handled above).

Endocrine and metabolic diseases.mesh_name: Nutritional and Metabolic Diseases + Endocrine System Diseases
Endocrine and metabolic diseases.notes: C18 = metabolic (diabetes, lipid, obesity). C19 = endocrine (thyroid, adrenal, pituitary). Both map to this single SNIH area.

Musculoskeletal diseases.notes: Includes osteoporosis, sarcopenia, bone diseases, joint diseases, muscular atrophy.

Mental health.notes: F03 is on the F (Psychiatry and Psychology) branch, not C. 'mobd' = Mental or Behavioral Dysfunction. Also match descriptors for sleep disorders (C10.886 cross-listed to F03).
